channel.title: Indian Stock Market Sentiment
channel.description: Automated sentiment analysis of Indian stock market news and Reddit discussions.

item.title: Market Sentiment: Neutral (54.83/100)
item.description: Overall Market Sentiment based on 50 sources. Aggregated Score: 54.83/100. Category: Neutral. Source Breakdown: Google News: 50 articles
